case_title: CHARLES O. JONES, INC. VS ATLANTIC AUTOMATIC SPRINKLER CO ATTN:HENRY LOUIE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHARLES O. JONES, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ATLANTIC AUTOMATIC SPRINKLER CO ATTN:HENRY LOUIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
